title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 545.530 - Who may take recognizance
text:
545.530.  Who may take recognizance. — Such recognizance may be taken by the court or judge making the order, or by any court or officer authorized by law to let to bail after indictment, and when taken out of the court in which the cause is pending, shall be filed with the clerk thereof.
(RSMo 1939 § 4025) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3636; 1919 § 3979; 1909 § 5186
